curation.synopsis: In the irradiated tunnels under Tallarn, a handful of survivors huddle around the planet's last working astropath as the Iron Warriors comb the wreckage above for anything still drawing breath. Marshal Lycus of the Imperial Fists knows what the rest of the Imperium has not yet learned: that Perturabo's Legion has come here in strength, and that someone has to live long enough to say so. The Iron Warriors know it too, and they mean to make sure that whatever message this shelter is trying to send reaches no other ear. A short, suffocating piece set in the first hours of the Tallarn campaign about the price of a single warning getting out before everything underground is sealed forever.

flags.reason: the astropath and the civilians at the centre of the shelter scenes are not named in accessible summaries; only Marshal Lycus surfaces by name.
